en-US.name: Horse Rug: Blanket Weather
en-US.subtitle: Turnout Layer Guide, Clipped
en-US.promotional_text: Rug your horse? Check today's weather and get one clear answer - which blanket to put on or take off - for each horse's clip, breed, age, and body condition.
en-US.description:
Which rug does your horse need today? Horse Rug turns the local weather into one clear answer - put a rug on, take one off, or leave it - based on your horse's clip, breed, age, body condition, and shelter.

The air temperature is not what your horse feels. Wind makes it colder, a wet coat loses most of its warmth, and a still sunny day can feel much warmer than the thermometer says. A fully clipped Thoroughbred and an unclipped native pony standing in the same field often need opposite decisions. Printed rug charts ignore all of this.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Add your horse: clip level, breed type, age, body condition, and whether it has shelter.
2. Horse Rug reads the current temperature, wind, rain, sun, and overnight low for your location.
3. You get a single verdict - which rug weight to use, or none - with the reason and the feels-like temperature.

Under a minute to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Verdict
One clear rug recommendation plus the why - the feels-like temperature after wind, wet, and sun, read at a glance instead of guessed from a chart.

Feels-Like For Your Horse
Wind chill, wet coat, and sun are combined with your horse's own comfort range, so the answer fits this horse, not a generic table.

Manual Weather Entry
No signal at the yard? Enter the conditions yourself and still get a full verdict, fully offline.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Multiple horses, each with its own profile and verdict
- 7-day rug forecast to plan the days ahead
- Day and night split so you can rug correctly before evening
- Flip and change reminders
- Per-horse rug log with comfort feedback that adjusts to your horse over time
- Rug wardrobe that names the rug you actually own

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch the local weather forecast from Open-Meteo. Coordinates are never stored on any server.
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Horse Rug provides general rugging guidance based on public weather data and husbandry principles. It is not a substitute for veterinary advice.

Terms of Use (EULA):

en-US.subscription_description: Multi-horse, 7-day forecast, day and night rug split, change reminders, and a per-horse rug log.
